# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent api gateway security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
      request_method:
        - GET
      content_type:
        - "application/json"
      cache_ttl: 300
      strategy: redis
      redis:
        host: "{vault://env/REDIS_HOST}"
        port: 6379
        password: "{vault://env/REDIS_PASSWORD}"
        ssl: true
        ssl_verify: true
        database: 1
        timeout: 2000
      vary_headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Encoding
      vary_query_params:
        - page
        - limit
        - category
        - sort
      cache_control: true
      storage_ttl: 600
    tags:
      - performance
      - products

  # Request validation for order creation
  - name: request-validator
    route: orders
    config:
      body_schema: |
        {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "items": {
              "type": "array",
              "minItems": 1,
              "maxItems": 100,
              "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": {
                  "product_id": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,64}$" },
                  "quantity": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1, "maximum": 9999 }
                },
                "required": ["product_id", "quantity"],
                "additionalProperties": false
              }
            },
            "shipping_address_id": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,64}$" },
            "payment_method_id": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,64}$" },
            "notes": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 500 }
          },
          "required": ["items", "shipping_address_id", "payment_method_id"],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      allowed_content_types:
        - "application/json"
      verbose_response: false
    tags:
      - validation
      - orders

  # Request validation for user registration
  - name: request-validator
    route: auth-register
    config:
      body_schema: |
        {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "email": { "type": "string", "format": "email", "maxLength": 254 },
            "password": { "type": "string", "minLength": 12, "maxLength": 128 },
            "first_name": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1, "maxLength": 100, "pattern": "^[\\p{L}\\s'-]+$" },
            "last_name": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1, "maxLength": 100, "pattern": "^[\\p{L}\\s'-]+$" },
            "accepted_terms": { "type": "boolean", "const": true }
          },
          "required": ["email", "password", "first_name", "last_name", "accepted_terms"],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      allowed_content_types:
        - "application/json"
      verbose_response: false
    tags:
      - validation
      - auth

  # Request transformer to add internal headers and strip dangerous ones
  - name: request-transformer
    config:
      remove:
        headers:
          - "X-Forwarded-For-Original"
          - "X-Real-IP-Original"
          - "X-Internal-Auth"
          - "X-Internal-Role"
          - "X-Internal-User-Id"
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Gateway-Version:1.0"
          - "X-Gateway-Timestamp:$(date +%s)"
    tags:
      - global
      - security

  # Circuit breaker pattern via request-termination on unhealthy upstreams
  - name: request-termination
    service: notification-service
    enabled: false
    config:
      status_code: 503
      message: "Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later."
    tags:
      - circuit-breaker
      - notifications

vaults:
  - name: env
    prefix: env
    description: "Environment variable vault for secrets"
    config:
      prefix: "KONG_VAULT_"
